title: Add Ai Anime Legends Generator to image
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [Ai Anime Legends Generator](https://anime.caasexpresss.com) to image
- Ai Anime Legends Generator generates anime legends using AI.

Fixes #10355

gist.headline: Legends enter the garden
gist.blurb: Ai Anime Legends Generator has landed in the app garden. It turns a prompt into an anime legend, because apparently folklore needed an API too.
gist.summary: Added Ai Anime Legends Generator to the community app directory, linking users to anime.caasexpresss.com for AI-generated anime legend creations.
gist.impact: Users can now discover Ai Anime Legends Generator alongside other Pollinations-powered apps and make anime-inspired legendary characters from prompts.
gist.visual_concept: Depict Polli as a tiny fantasy artist wearing a painter's beret, helping a friendly anime-style pixel hero emerge from a glowing retro image-generator monitor. Surround them with blooming code-flowers, a small legend book, and vine-wrapped terminals to represent the newly listed community image app.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the pollinations.ai bee mascot, with yellow body, dark brown stripes, pink cheek blush, light blue wings, and a tiny painter's beret, presenting a friendly anime-inspired pixel hero stepping out of a warm CRT image-generator monitor; a little book labeled "LEGENDS" rests beside blooming code-plants and pixel flowers. Cozy 8-bit pixel art aesthetic with a prominent lime green (#ecf874) and soft pastel gradient background, chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes, nostalgic but beautiful.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the pollinations.ai bee mascot, with yellow body, dark brown stripes, pink cheek blush, light blue wings, and a tiny painter's beret, presenting a friendly anime-inspired pixel hero stepping out of a warm CRT image-generator monitor; a little book labeled "LEGENDS" rests beside blooming code-plants and pixel flowers. Cozy 8-bit pixel art aesthetic with a prominent lime green (#ecf874) and soft pastel gradient background, chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes, nostalgic but beautiful.
